**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:****[We have SIX days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 59,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,714 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by February 23 rd](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzqBVfhNjAq2foo8fMwD1LHMlLBgnFCS56YAOvda5EK2WMtStwzd2DuygaFY6l0k-3wrZ271z08Y94wZV_syDoqLpFEqCJk3luDwFceIo2npqEq4-PHnS-zHGeCzbfTVMYQMWKtaLed5yff1JmQeljxrud5VgSfS8WTMHQCsFaw6-SCxdqnbL3i81DAT0EpJxjhu__bLmXMAvd1WMx0oOEpA%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzuFdQ-5z9WWhlAojU8ZH8QAjcU3GdFbZ89H1Q5NXpFLRNty4iZwjVLZXacRr7N0G7VCa5QMh-JyCEil6sD8KgFp0M1OrpukFOU7uLV6F-j4wsLvTfPAv9OCd55I-Y5TEYpi0sgfIsUixjlMHL0PqJ284ZA0XfiyUX0SemKV-y1-KtYjjB_-U1MEDx1EzKzSu3VdfGR87QgZGYjSCRC6wbyk%3D)
Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order.

In the first week of his presidency Joe Biden signed more than 40 executive orders. For a guy who campaigned on bipartisan compromise, **he’s off to a very lousy start**. So much for working with Republicans – or even his own party – in Congress!

**This is just the beginning:** in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODznrivqIwI2u2WhehWK7pFPZPGRQPk_u8QBGvGXvU0KGqwaGz1LU-eIKV3PUSKbSRKLKw4MroIvjGlhZcagja8Fx8tb6DjKATe805sRSuDUxximKGb92FTCHUnFVoUXy5YOd2nxP2wttbWTihCT6rgjUIaoO9F3ZvDyC-SRwhYS5CphAiy0Dbyli515tj7uUemxP8MkSyBBOKVCj5bUmiQkM%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

Before the State of the Union speech on February 23rd, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzhDDJYAMJukT20QSGDUBgyihbnFu17fcWIVHxGO7vJqlRe8eDH2nQoMLXbD2p0fYjnPZbKeY1_GvK04orkth1vCRl6wlStveqqk5eWsdGRI68xO0QIY_ZsWxZHtnJmp5AHcW4Buaucgm0124uxzrqzDgV33Bom3NsLCeXJYsN6LVYehZycge2xcAezzloUsC3NRSmZ1oynoROa9W_RVhlmE%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have SIX days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 59,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,714 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal. **

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzr-A5BPEuq_2ZiTT50gotLztnXgB9N0e2wnSQjRdSMGYjnCjAVtT6nRvFsdQdSR2TEJZahIolL8CrZsHv1h0np9fEJjM3kDmRMujNMRMg3Z6FPjOqdOaH87hPGE5yQAFTZm7ybZD83dR4iYPSp-fS7jZDH39PMW2FEXZHl_BZqOQncz-g-f4KTTwVJa4p_PrY161MtygYQc6mmdPCZp-JJQ%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzlXGnBn_b3go3UeUgzySisNUcQFED31ZiaxDoePyLVLnjYTINkEsaGxajGZR1FnXnZYoz8kAs604WoEiHE4Sm5A6-CMZthgybCT7N07IA9ea72pxzg9NIFuqDauqPp49Kn8dlGPlty6x0q2ahO5eaPvAxSrJVRUkfBS-rUaBPRgwJgRiGa4l48sG28Zam3u-_1-1F_TkkXguw6OrdsJucUg%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODzuk5LBG4y-pfauNvVyOuxSWJ3XkfAYEkbV1ZrPdt36fd4hQSQUDg0hvgJe83yrOzEHJ2hkPV3kp3D2pv9l6Tyep9Hknb5usbV0UmpjB1mS-ItAGJ_2U6fpypN2EX7n0yETesPz6cBl4q6AuwLIXwWmYjpLqKSDhQw8qscCvlJ3ptUP9gS2W3RUBsmQ8mFBbeorPvdJFB2JphLHMkIPVnsfM%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=051895a234b841e9b39c5377ece09926&_e=t1-xxHFXESKqOCoOgZBeSE9FtDrQ4TID680EEb6pZZEJ85ZbowU7nfuvP8MvwA3ItkCsyMX28fSIGf6gU6APeITTStVUW3bIDxjPA_t-5tpX2qzeOmESQs0TO7o0QNEN2jD7N3gTPI5R2rljw5qlS-Yfh1bChYTJ6xyV3si7qHsjvee4NFpmnvkpG8_3X_WGZ1TKl3PzMnOoSXlp7xCMlG99k--tTJd1KNH_wyswOf24CGAWiqXiT71nJjHh_UzLStv96ZHRE0in_mD7rsODztWw3bomFW3ydd41OWi13lVBmqeC1ExEoaOujk23yKCAm6N0pW0to9cJ1rdhjZcr70aJOCxNbog-ppM_qfUcfbZYR18J1tuyB5-frtB9T1A7_GjRPPCrcUoXmfrZE99jSfgVp95ECDWnTj4l1W41uxdAay6IePi_1bJ2u51-3FVz08WXy14Dz3TYmeehk20CU3sN-QM3-sEwwoXXZSUnHJg%3D)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

I have been demanding a federal investigation. It appears one is finally underway. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/114178c1920e/robs-wrap-up-happy-superbowl-sunday-10047364?e=9f843ba602)

## >>BREAKING NEWS<<
FBI Launches Probe into Governor Cuomo's Administration

Friends,

Governor Cuomo is on a warpath.

He is attacking anyone who dares to stand up to him. Today, he personally attacked me and reportedly threatened to 'destroy' a Democrat Assembly member.

There is only one way to describe his behavior: **Unhinged.**

Now, things are getting worse for the Governor. [The](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=385db2a65a&e=9f843ba602)[ FBI and the U.S. Attorney have reportedly launched an investigation](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=ee6450a6bf&e=9f843ba602)[ into Governor Cuomo's administration.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=d3df6924d6&e=9f843ba602)[ ](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=8a4e405d0c&e=9f843ba602)

I have been demanding a federal investigation - now it seems we will finally have one.

# **[> >Please make an urgent contribution today to help me continue to fight against Governor Cuomo<<](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=b1c8c02d64&e=9f843ba602)**

Governor Cuomo is notorious for political retribution. I won't back down, but [I need your help to fight back.](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=bef3b764cc&e=9f843ba602)

We MUST hold this Governor accountable for his actions.

[Chip in today](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=05bdc261c8&e=9f843ba602) to help me continue to fight. Make an [urgent contribution of $25, $50 or even $100](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=8509a2a44d&e=9f843ba602) to help me deliver the accountability New Yorkers deserve.

Thank you,

Rob Ortt

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Half the World
body:
Responsibilities that cover half the earth's surface... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Half the World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Foreign Affairs Subcommittee on Asia and the Pacific has jurisdiction over half the earth's surface and more than half the world's population. I was just named the Lead Republican (Ranking Member) of the committee in the upcoming Congress. China will be a particular focus of attention. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Undermining Our Friends; Rewarding Our Enemies](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-d/)
The anti-Trump pro-Biden mainstream press is breathlessly covering a second bogus impeachment this week. You can read here in this week's blog about something far more important. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [It's Time for a Second Contract With America](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tllyjdlt-kujkulhluu-u/)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Technical difficulties
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws]
Peter,
We need to upgrade the TNDP website. My transition team and I have been hard at work evaluating the TNDP systems and procedures and feel that our website must be a top priority. Technology is constantly changing and our current site is simply not taking advantage of the tools that are out there today. We need a website that makes organizing and mobilizing easy and intuitive. With hundreds of thousands of Spanish speaking Tennesseans, it is also long overdue that we add a Spanish translation tool.
We’ve already gotten proposals from several firms ranging from $20,000 to $30,000 – but ultimately the decision will be in the hands of our supporters. We can only afford what we can raise. Will you help us by making a donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws]
This is the type of fundamental infrastructure improvement that the TNDP is going to have to make. Creating an online hub for voter engagement, grassroots training, and candidate recruitment is essential to our success. This is how we begin to turn Tennessee Blue.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Greg Stanton
subject: AZ needs more COVID-19 vaccines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
Here in Arizona we have already distributed nearly 900,000 COVID vaccines. We’re gaining momentum in our efforts to vaccinate and protect Arizonans. I recently wrote to President Biden to request 300,00 vaccines per week from the federal government to help speed up and maximize the process. We are making progress, but we need the help and cooperation of all Arizonans to make sure we can save lives.

The previous administration set the nation back, so we all have to do our part to make sure that we can recover. I thank you for your continued support of my efforts to fight COVID-19 here in Arizona.

Thank you,
-- Greg

name: =?utf-8?Q?Laura=20Loomer?=
subject: Wanna join Laura Loomer in the fight against censorship at the Supreme Court in the next week? It not to late and we need your help!
body:
A landmark court case will be heard at the Supreme Court in the next week against Big Tech. Other patriots have chipped in already. How can you help? | | | **IT IS NOT TO LATE - DON'T MISS YOUR CHANCE TO BE A PART OF HISTORY AS THE MOST BANNED WOMAN IN THE WORLD GOES TO THE SUPREME COURT IN THE NEXT WEEK!**
---
| |
---
| |
---
#### This month, the Supreme Court of the United States will be deciding whether or not to hear a legal case filed by myself, Laura Loomer, and Freedom Watch against Big Tech Tyrants Google, Facebook, Twitter, and Apple. I am represented by powerhouse attorney Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch. The lawsuit claims that these Big Tech companies have been practicing anti-competitive and discriminatory practices against conservatives in coordination with one another to silence conservative voices online.
---
| Since the original filing in 2018, Big Tech has now targeted President Trump, political candidates, elected officials, conservative journalists, everyday conservatives, and small business owners like me who depend on social media to survive especially during the pandemic. _**YOU** can and will be next if we don't stop this!_ This type of behavior is something one would expect to see in CHINA, IRAN, and elsewhere **NOT** in our beloved USA and I will not rest until their illegal actions stop and we are no longer targeted. As I am sure you can imagine, these tyrants are huge and have deep pockets and that's why I urgently need your patriotic donations to help to continue to fight this battle at the Supreme Court and elsewhere for all conservatives, **click here to donate now** : [http://bit.ly/SC0TUS](https://voterinfusion.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=49aaeb063c431085ef7f1d81a&id=d266672172&e=7578396889) You can literally be a part of history and saving the first amendment with a generous donation today!
---
| |
---
This is the first time that a case of this magnitude against the Big Tech Tyrants has been petitioned for review in the US Supreme Court and we filed the case back in 2018 when Larry Klayman and I foreshadowed what was going to develop recently. We sued Google, Facebook, Twitter and Apple over allegations that the platforms violated the First Amendment, the Sherman Antitrust Act and the District of Columbia Human Rights Act.
---
| If you want to see the actual petition and why this is so important and why your generous donation will help benefit all Americans, click on the link below.
[https://www.supremecourt.gov/DocketPDF/20/20-969/165267/20210104131136088_Google%20Cert%20Petition%20LK%20final.pdf](https://voterinfusion.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=49aaeb063c431085ef7f1d81a&id=ac31ae05dc&e=7578396889)
---
| We urgently need your financial support today and there are no limits on the amount of donations as this is not a political campaign. Click here to donate: [http://bit.ly/SC0TUS](https://voterinfusion.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=49aaeb063c431085ef7f1d81a&id=386b8818da&e=7578396889)

In addition to donating, please help us blast awareness by sharing this information on social media.
---
| | | | | | [](https://voterinfusion.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=49aaeb063c431085ef7f1d81a&id=236ce843a2&e=7578396889) | [Share](https://voterinfusion.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=49aaeb063c431085ef7f1d81a&id=0504703516&e=7578396889)
---|---

---|---

| Respectfully,

name: =?iso-8859-1?q?Juli=E1n?= Castro
subject: Help us feed Texans during this crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
Millions of Texans are without electricity, heat, or running water. We’re setting a $50K goal to help feed Texas families. Can you pitch in?
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25199101/273097146/-1445340428?refcode=emheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2MWZkOC0xMjcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpKLjJoMyWjSNWQB9ynQF8b9HMZeGJ2X4M50CnXpEgA=&emci=8ade6620-0d72-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=04b61fd8-1272-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=1262380)
Team,
This week millions of Texans lost their power, their running water, and their heat in the middle of a winter storm unlike any Texas has seen in years.
Our state leadership failed to prepare for this storm, failed to quickly respond to the crisis, and has failed to take blame for their catastrophic mismanagement. It may be days before electricity and running water is restored for every Texan -- **which is why People First is working to support organizations helping Texans through this crisis.**
[**Friend, can you pitch in right now to help millions of Texans feed their families in this crisis? We’re setting a goal to raise $50,000 to support Feeding Texas, the largest hunger relief organization in the state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25199102/273097147/419943088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2MWZkOC0xMjcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpKLjJoMyWjSNWQB9ynQF8b9HMZeGJ2X4M50CnXpEgA=)[Donate ››](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25199103/273097148/419943088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2MWZkOC0xMjcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpKLjJoMyWjSNWQB9ynQF8b9HMZeGJ2X4M50CnXpEgA=)
After a year of suffering through the pandemic and failed leadership from our state government, Texans are experiencing a once-in-a-generation storm. The power outages are disproportionately hurting the poorest and most vulnerable Texans, and it’s not clear how long this could last.
With your continued support throughout the last year, we’ve supported organizations working to end food insecurity and hunger in Texas and across the nation. And we’ve helped hundreds of Dreamers renew their DACA status. Now, we’re asking for your help once again to support Texans in their time of need.
[**If you’re able to, please consider pitching in to help keep Texas families fed. Your contribution will go a long way toward our $50,000 goal, and may put food on the table for Texans in need.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25199104/273097149/419943088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2MWZkOC0xMjcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpKLjJoMyWjSNWQB9ynQF8b9HMZeGJ2X4M50CnXpEgA=)
Thank you for your continued support,
Julián
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25199105/273097150/565258459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2MWZkOC0xMjcyLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DpKLjJoMyWjSNWQB9ynQF8b9HMZeGJ2X4M50CnXpEgA=&emci=8ade6620-0d72-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=04b61fd8-1272-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=1262380)
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The RINOs will need to bring it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Np2OhzgqqVYNoOWpb3FXt6-HHRWFAcNiOkywHmXrhwVrd4RmGeFneT7J8_KZ6ufUZ6VLaBxMpCyid3cDk4lVhndVQ0y0heIDm_q-Q9w6AgRY6yrMFF3bOV8PbdIZlW1yzclRqWcBW9oL1r-c_Z6lAF6PyE3wZg-NsmHF9iFKtU2n7y5wUkdvUg==&c=nvxO-vPI70wXUsIOylt35vWiggHmMPihmosdBJay1JnMSV45LS9DlQ==&ch=ceORE2nagk5YAaCjZJG3IAMwr81neL7RTS_HboCvCzXj2I59wTyRnA==)
---
| Peter,
Republican Rep. Adam Kinzinger - a certified Never Trump RINO - announced that he is starting a Political Action Committee to go after what he calls "Trumpism" and [called me out by name as one of his targets.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Np2OhzgqqVYNoOWpb3FXt6-HHRWFAcNiOkywHmXrhwVrd4RmGeFneT7J8_KZ6ufUZ6VLaBxMpCyid3cDk4lVhndVQ0y0heIDm_q-Q9w6AgRY6yrMFF3bOV8PbdIZlW1yzclRqWcBW9oL1r-c_Z6lAF6PyE3wZg-NsmHF9iFKtU2n7y5wUkdvUg==&c=nvxO-vPI70wXUsIOylt35vWiggHmMPihmosdBJay1JnMSV45LS9DlQ==&ch=ceORE2nagk5YAaCjZJG3IAMwr81neL7RTS_HboCvCzXj2I59wTyRnA==)
My response: Bring It
As I've said before, we are in a battle for the soul of the Republican Party, and I intend to win it. This battle will not be won by RINOs like Liz Cheney or Mitt Romney caving to the liberal mob, or Reps. like Adam Kinzinger who lack the courage to stand up for America-First policies.
---

Friend,
The RSLC just launched a national commission to restore public confidence in our elections.
**It 's absolutely critical that Americans know their votes are being counted, and that as a nation, we restore trust in our electoral process.**
But common sense reforms like proper signature verification and photo ID submission are already under scrutiny from national Democrats. The far-left doesn't want our efforts to succeed, so they're doing everything they can do to STOP us.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XqU17KtdyQaEINhTHAU-cwoUPKFCCQWKkK9EzsVpOjlbo3h5gL4xJRLhx9nv7wnJEq3lRUBV_0_3zCaD7aARl0N51oiLISaE9dR1_S2s3bHtq6TOAEzr6kbzi6mg-vkA1pEOHGMqXLs=&c=1epZsLCCtogySJ1LqQ-mdjmHvk0lOWDNesoiMLoptsHqeHaKl-bxLQ==&ch=Dj109FTrxVjKNsOqhkcBlVkEU4xJAKdxKwouS6-_t3-V5q9e1RbqVw==).

clean_body: Make it harder to CHEAT ** == Friend, The RSLC just launched a national commission to restore public confidence in our elections. It 's absolutely critical that Americans know their votes are being counted, and that as a nation, we restore trust in our electoral process. But common sense reforms like proper signature verification and photo ID submission are already under scrutiny from national Democrats. The far-left doesn't want our efforts to succeed, so they're doing everything they can do to STOP us. That's why we're inviting you to add your name, and join our national coalition to make it easier to vote and harder to cheat. == == == National Democrats are going to be doing EVERYTHING they can to thwart our efforts, that's why it's absolutely critical we have your support. == Thank you, RSLC To visit our website's about page, click ==. To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click ==. You can contribute via mail at the address below. Your input is critical to our success. Send us an email with your feedback: info@rslc.gop Connect with us on == and ==. Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004. This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at ==. | | RSLC | 1201 F Street NW Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1b9342ad85&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi ,

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the Chair of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. We are dedicated to moving forward the America First agenda, and fighting the Swamp in both parties. [Now more than ever, we need you in that fight!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=304e1464e4&e=ba6e67b849)

Good news - President Trump has been acquitted of impeachment, AGAIN!

Once again, Trump foils Pelosi's unconstitutional attempt to abuse impeachment against him. But now, we have work to do!

**_This sad episode only showed us how many RINOs we have in the GOP- and how much work we have before us to remake the party as the Party of Trump._**

We need to primary these RINOs who voted to convict Trump, a private citizen, in this unconstitutional manner:
* Richard Burr of North Carolina
* Bill Cassidy of Louisiana
* Susan Collins of Maine
* Lisa Murkowski of Alaska
* Mitt Romney of Utah
* Ben Sasse of Nebraska
* Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania

We also need to work to primary and defeat those faithless Republicans in the House who, despite using the President to win re-election just months ago, voted to impeach him last month.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d71caddb1b&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Apparently however, the biggest need may be for new leadership of both the House and the Senate Republican caucuses.

In the House, Kevin McCarthy defended RINO Liz Cheney, who voted to impeach the President. That must mean he agrees with her vote- and needs to be primaried.

In the Senate, "Cocaine Mitch" McConnell also backed the RINOs. Read this excerpt from a recent article:
---
| | _In his speech Saturday on the Senate floor, the normally staid McConnell did not mince words about the former president.

He said Trump is "practically and morally responsible" for the insurrection on Jan. 6. He said Trump's supporters were “assaulting the Capitol in his name” and "carried his banners” while “screaming their loyalties to him.”

Where the rioters' loyalties rested “was obvious,” McConnell said. He said the riot was unsurprising given the lies Trump had fed to his supporters about the election being stolen.

“This was an intensifying crescendo of conspiracy theories orchestrated by an outgoing president who seemed determined to either overturn the voters’ decision or else torch our institutions on the way out.”

“Former President Trump’s actions that preceded the riot were a disgraceful, disgraceful dereliction of duty,” McConnell said._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=3148bd0dbd&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **We need to primary the RINOs and replace them with solid America First conservatives who will vote to replace McCarthy and McConnell as leaders.**

President Trump fought the Left, always. That is what we need now- leaders who recognize the threat posed by the Left and will fight them tooth and nail.

_Drain the DC Swamp PAC will ALWAYS back the fighters running to lead us..._ We backed Trump. We backed Marjorie Taylor Greene - and we WILL back primaries to Republicans who join or capitulate to the Left. We will back primary challengers to the traitors who betrayed President Trump.

**We need to elect America First conservatives!** Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger and Mitt Romney!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7d5711837c&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f48cb57dc9&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. They use people, they surrender. We lift people up, and we fight! They are whiny Leftists. We are the America First pro-Trump Super PAC!

We are joining Trump's fight to oust the RINOs. Let's punish the Liz Cheneys of Congress. [Help us fight for the Republic!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b6fec21cf4&e=ba6e67b849)

The old GOP is gone. Time to make the GOP a pro-Trump, America First party. The RINOs will just allow Pelosi and Schumer more power. If we want America First policies, we need to support America First leaders!

No more surrendering. Time to fight! [Will you help us?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=284b0c80c1&e=ba6e67b849)

We won't let the Never Trumpers like Cheney get away with this impeachment sham. [Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help us give muscle to conservatives - get them the firepower they need to beat the establishment! ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=753fd460fd&e=ba6e67b849)

The time for surrender-minded career politicians is over. [Help us push forward and fight for America!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=16c0e2e587&e=ba6e67b849)

We have primaries for a reason: replacing bad Republicans with good ones!

[Please donate now. We must fight back.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=eca6aa2210&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---

body:
Help Rep. Feenstra stand up against Washington's out of control spending... |
---
| | [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=1920c637dc&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| | Friend,

Washington DC’s spending is out of control. Our country is 28 trillion dollars in debt, and the Democrats in Congress are currently trying to ram through a 1.9 TRILLION dollar spending bill. This bill would increase our national debt to 41 TRILLION DOLLARS by the end of its forecast.

This out of control spending threatens the future of our children and our grandchildren. It must stop!

[**Will you help Rep. Feenstra stand up against this out of control spending with a contribution of $25, $30, $35?**](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=681aa5edd0&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| [Chip In Today!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=04c6142205&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip In Today!")
---
| As a member of the House Budget Committee, Rep. Feenstra works tirelessly every day to reign in this out of control spending and inject some Iowa commonsense into the federal budget.

We balanced the budget in Iowa, and Rep. Feenstra can do the same in Congress with the budget practices we used in Iowa. This means not spending more than you take in and ensuring you save for a rainy day. Our Iowa families and businesses do this every day – our government should do the same.

Now is the time to push back against this out of control spending. [**Join our team today by chipping in just $10, $15 or $25 to support Rep. Feenstra and help him deliver a balanced federal budget. **](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=d444e57bfd&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| [Donate Here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=74fb841875&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Donate Here")
---
| Thanks for your continued support,

Team Feenstra
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323

Joe Biden said something TERRIBLE about our police
Friend,
During CNN's town hall this week, **Biden attacked both the police and the military** -- saying they are fueling the 'growth of white supremacy'.
This is not a joke... he's serious. Joe Biden and his radicals in the streets think that the brave men and women OF ALL RACES who serve our communities and country are white supremacists. Disgusting.
That's why your State Republicans are working tirelessly to **Back the Blue** -- to defend those who protect us when we need it most.
Your local law enforcement officers have your back -- do you have theirs?

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yNN8olbPfffuyjALAphtAnWXTN3GAtmykEikGjrnhlF4ksNhW-HHP_6U71xQMzXoITSMqdjHH8vfNLZebM_DqPL7XV8uM3T0hlG2NIrMvalsN0DVtsQvVMOqCJl0S5x1X4vstl3Rers=&c=DzbesIvIeXtQwoEXxBFfjSWfWPOr8wRfa4_LXkUM9FWb1x1rhQKhBw==&ch=WoXD0PmwK0miO1GwzuazdBpRwopeVPdYRI28DNkDO9XU_Z0GdHbKbg==).

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Amanda Edwards
subject: Assistance With Texas Winter Storms & Aftermath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
| Assistance With Texas Winter Storms & Aftermath
---
| |
---
| | |
---
As many already know, millions of Texans faced unprecedented conditions when this week's winter storms collided with the lack of energy preparedness in Texas. As a result, millions were without power, water, or both for days in many cases. While we remember those whose lives were lost and those who must repair extensive damage due to pipes bursting and more, we want to provide resources for those who are interested in helping and for those who are still in need of help. The Houston Chronicle identified the following resources from which we obtained the following information. This list is just a sample of the list provided by The Houston Chronicle. To access the full list, please access the full article [HERE.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUn0p-qrjmUhEGJ0cmliCAiuQife6sfcplfp0hYagiEmdK-vPqvzbgkITsU7hk267UtJpOf6FbV0EhMVx8Xe7KqVY32i1SOHXiGA22Lv_ru9gXEePb45sHlFfmAEaWzEN701NoP-WU_2rnI1tFY59fJrGnztuWAaOqJG5pv1BA69_Jd22DJy6JzsCRPR2Xr9El36-_GOZwdkQ=&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==)

WARMING SHELTER HELP
* Gallery Furniture: The Gallery Furniture stores on the North Freeway and Grand Parkway are available as warming shelters at: 6006 North Freeway or 7227 W. Grand Parkway South

HOMELESS
* Houston Area Women's Center: Shelter and support services for victims of domestic violence. Phone: (713) 528-2121 or visit [http://www.hawc.org/](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUMxUaoAnytJIa0gTN0X3sEtLr6xs07p9eoDoVg07leLg_ZVL2L5jyXS50756M9aLYw_rRSicOeOI=&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==)
* Star of Hope: The Star of Hope homeless shelter welcomes donations of toiletries such as lotion, shampoo, deodorant, toothpaste and airbrushes, plus diapers (size 0) and pull-up diapers (size 4T and 5T), underwear for men and women (all sizes), towels and washcloths, twin size sheets and blankets. [sohmission.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUIXJWZphWt7G3eEmUdcaCsbyybk2P1nNBC_6dTCCxkYqViv4NbWa4us7QVEkfe3uL36CqVjblwNQOsb4g6cEHLENS7AblyvpPx39JZmypNJ-GKNrRZe1Ay-1Es93Pq5Ze-7NzTBU8DjI=&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==).

MENTAL HEALTH
* National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: Call (800) 273-8255 for English or (888) 628-9454 for Spanish.
* Crisis Intervention Hotline of Houston: For 24/7 confidential crisis counseling. Call the general line at (832) 416-1177 or (832) 416-1199 for the Teen Talk Hotline. You can also visit [crisishotline.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUwnjeFjxzwE-yvD1x7F2-EwW-f_U7UwciEvTPJ2JbPe1ANqRjrz3el73wTxi4G8g4G0-cTLRDyW8SCtRtIxhIQw==&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==)
* Mental Health Support Line: This new service helps callers 9 a.m.-5 p.m. Monday-Friday. Call (713) 558-3777.

VOLUNTEER OR DONATE
* Volunteer Houston assists agencies who are looking for volunteers throughout Houston. For information, go to [volunteerhou.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUvu08aszgUjaQbTTcu7HGIC1KP3bc9atvH9DSLjiQL06lqkSllkmSzraiNKEgUNIvMyEGp3e3KJDLoICqMP8TUg==&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==).
* The Houston Food Bank needs nonperishables such as peanut butter, canned proteins, protein bars and other things that don't require cooking. To register for volunteer work or to make a donation visit [www.houstonfoodbank.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItU_7Ia487DehkVyBHCvuAE3euLCTCz9qc8UA-aCC2HYLxQggmPLrgGWMDQ4w3DLVIGvufEYdLsOn4kSF9pg9Yaz2ql0VRPs4fw&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==) or call 713-547-8604.
* Interfaith Ministries for Greater Houston: This agency administers programs ranging from Meals on Wheels to Animals, and offers refugee services and promotes interfaith and community partnerships. The facilities are closed through the end of the week, but for future volunteer opportunities or to make a donation go to [imgh.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUJobAB5jqem2FxytRfqQqE-IFYkmawPlqXmch60iCxcKzIJIGUsPTt6XtGx5iGUH5ceCk2li7q-pJT8EPE6qP764e9Y2pB5IwZkTygyt67NTB6cenm2tQjlC_n0MHbOEA_g_HsHUhkK2AvtnaZNiM8sqHSrsRUnq5XVIrisLMjStKP37JqIpdPHXMjNDSvur2&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==).
* Salvation Army: Offers a variety of services from disaster relief to homeless shelters, food pantries, job training and rehab. [salvationarmyusa.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ax0fnPqAREeanXjs7iDFL1K7EJo6sV6ebG91EdqBpLSRclID_WoiO2Kst7AfItUgJL4Y5vCERDtJx3jBU7FT5SUpmMs42Lsr_oOWMF_wIkLzWTRh-P5GSvMen5j_cjVGgVIy7XB0Pint7iRm5cCS6aLMso2Sr3L8my_F_XIVI0=&c=g-MK2Y3sLuDDdGw2w1eajclWnl_Mkum48CfACa7dJFFCYMc1bpTR5A==&ch=GmLBZXA6xIVaVSbs28iKnTWym-euYSmhUnpLKVoOmUUi4lNG3Pu-Cg==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Assistance With Texas Winter Storms & Aftermath | | | | | As many already know, millions of Texans faced unprecedented conditions when this week's winter storms collided with the lack of energy preparedness in Texas. As a result, millions were without power, water, or both for days in many cases. While we remember those whose lives were lost and those who must repair extensive damage due to pipes bursting and more, we want to provide resources for those who are interested in helping and for those who are still in need of help. The Houston Chronicle identified the following resources from which we obtained the following information. This list is just a sample of the list provided by The Houston Chronicle. To access the full list, please access the full article == WARMING SHELTER HELP Gallery Furniture: The Gallery Furniture stores on the North Freeway and Grand Parkway are available as warming shelters at: 6006 North Freeway or 7227 W. Grand Parkway South HOMELESS Houston Area Women's Center: Shelter and support services for victims of domestic violence. Phone: (713) 528-2121 or visit == Star of Hope: The Star of Hope homeless shelter welcomes donations of toiletries such as lotion, shampoo, deodorant, toothpaste and airbrushes, plus diapers (size 0) and pull-up diapers (size 4T and 5T), underwear for men and women (all sizes), towels and washcloths, twin size sheets and blankets. ==. MENTAL HEALTH National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: Call (800) 273-8255 for English or (888) 628-9454 for Spanish. Crisis Intervention Hotline of Houston: For 24/7 confidential crisis counseling. Call the general line at (832) 416-1177 or (832) 416-1199 for the Teen Talk Hotline. You can also visit == Mental Health Support Line: This new service helps callers 9 a.m.-5 p.m. Monday-Friday. Call (713) 558-3777. VOLUNTEER OR DONATE Volunteer Houston assists agencies who are looking for volunteers throughout Houston. For information, go to ==. The Houston Food Bank needs nonperishables such as peanut butter, canned proteins, protein bars and other things that don't require cooking. To register for volunteer work or to make a donation visit == or call 713-547-8604. Interfaith Ministries for Greater Houston: This agency administers programs ranging from Meals on Wheels to Animals, and offers refugee services and promotes interfaith and community partnerships. The facilities are closed through the end of the week, but for future volunteer opportunities or to make a donation go to ==. Salvation Army: Offers a variety of services from disaster relief to homeless shelters, food pantries, job training and rehab. == | | | | Sincerely, Amanda K. Edwards Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | | | Be The Solution | == | == == == == | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch continues to make history by fighting for the rule of law...for the American people's right to know...and for accountability from our government.
**That is why I ask you to **[**support Judicial Watch with your best tax-deductible contribution now.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52962&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTgxNzQwMTA=)
**I especially hope you will **[**donate now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52962&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTgxNzQwMTA=)** because **your support has a direct impact on our ability to stay on track with existing programs and expand into other key programs critical to our mission of fighting for the rule of law and open government.
With your [**best donation now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52962&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTgxNzQwMTA=), Judicial Watch will:
* **Keep fighting to keep our elections honest;**

* **Keep digging into serious allegations of Biden family corruption and influence peddling;**

* **Keep fighting to shut down sanctuary cities;**

* **Keep fighting for accountability in Congress;**

* **Keep fighting to get to the truth about the Obama-Clinton scandals;**

* **And we will not give the Deep State a pass on its illegal secrecy.**

I hope these brief bullet points reminds you of how important our work continues to be as we confront dishonest politicians of _both_ political parties _and_ combat unlawful government secrecy. And I hope you realize that with [**your best donation now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52962&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTgxNzQwMTA=) we will continue to have a high-level impact on the challenges to the rule of law that we are facing.
Since 1994, Judicial Watch has fought for accountability, the rule of law and the people's "right to know." We are independent of political parties. As our remarkable record shows, we are _best_ qualified to police our government and protect our constitutional system. _We rely on you_ , as we have always relied on the selfless support of patriotic Americans _to help give us the resources we need_.

| | Friends-

The news is everywhere.

The press is reporting that the FBI and U.S. Attorney in Brooklyn have opened an investigation into Governor Cuomo and his administration’s cover up of the deaths of more than 15,000 seniors in New York nursing homes.

We were the [first to call](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbSUyRm5pY29sZW1hbGxpb3Rha2lzJTJGY3VvbW8taW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbiUzRnV0bV9zb3VyY2UlM0RlbWFpbCUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RhcHBlYWwlMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0RDdW9tbyUyQkRheXMlMkJBcmUlMkJOdW1iZXJlZCUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=451A638A1A8834) for the U.S. Department of Justice to investigate Cuomo’s deadly decision to order nursing homes to accept COVID-positive patients last spring.

Then we were the first to call on Biden’s Justice Department to do the right thing and [investigate Cuomo’s cover up](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbSUyRm5pY29sZW1hbGxpb3Rha2lzJTJGaW52ZXN0aWdhdGUtdGhlLWNvdmVyLXVwJTNGdXRtX3NvdXJjZSUzRGVtYWlsJTI2dXRtX21lZGl1bSUzRGFwcGVhbCUyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbiUzREN1b21vJTJCRGF5cyUyQkFyZSUyQk51bWJlcmVkJTJCRW1haWw=&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=451A638A1A8835) when it first came to light.

I’m not going to stop until the truth is exposed and justice is delivered.

Whether it's by resignation, prosecution or defeat at the ballot box, Governor Cuomo's days are numbered. My petition has garnered thousands of signatures from New Yorkers who feel the same.

[Please help support my efforts to fight for what’s right by contributing today.](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbSUyRm5pY29sZW1hbGxpb3Rha2lzJTJGZW1haWwlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNEYXBwZWFsJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNEQ3VvbW8lMkJEYXlzJTJCQXJlJTJCTnVtYmVyZWQlMkJFbWFpbA==&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=451A638A1A8836)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Morrisey?=
subject: Peter, we got your six!
body:
Biden asked for new limits on the types of firearms and ammunition you can purchase.The President says his ideas are “common sense.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=24057c0240&u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=2c3b924408)
---
|
---
|
---
# We got your six!
Dear Peter,Just a few days ago, President Biden announced a sweeping new proposal to attack your gun rights.He asked for onerous new background checks on gun sales and new limits on the types of firearms and ammunition you can purchase.The President says his ideas are “common sense.”As the West Virginia Attorney General charged with defending my state and America, I don’t think the President’s ideas represent “common sense.” Rather, they would strike at the very heart of one of our most important constitutional rights: the Second Amendment.Well, here’s a news flash for you coming out of West Virginia. I am not going to let Joe Biden’s gun-control ideas move forward without a fight.Right now, I am working with my attorneys general colleagues and other leaders on the best ways we can protect and defend America from these constitutionally-suspect policies.We have a long history in my Office of defending the 2nd Amendment. I stood strong for the West Virginia constitutional carry law and maintain an A+ rating from trusted gun groups.I have helped secure reciprocity agreements with dozens of states and have prevailed in court against liberals’ efforts to push gun-control on our citizens.
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=d15f8f911b&e=24057c0240)
[We got your six in West Virginia.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=6e35d68723&e=24057c0240)But we need your help. My fights with the Biden Administration are already making me a major target of the far-left. They are even trying to impeach me for my conservative values.We can’t let that happen. To defeat President Biden and his team, we need assistance from an army of patriots who will support us financially and in the grassroots.Will you contribute $35 to help protect your gun rights and defend America?**If you donate today, we will be able to secure a rare 200 percent match from other allies.**
| [Donate $35 = $70 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=3e01bf1ed5&e=24057c0240)
---

---
| [Donate $75 = $150 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=38f07b5f9e&e=24057c0240)
---
| [Donate $100 = $200 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=a1b75e7789&e=24057c0240)
---
| [Donate $250 = $500 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=78599dc73d&e=24057c0240)
---
America is waking up to the risk of losing its liberties during a Biden Administration.Help us protect them.Keep the faith.
Sincerely,Patrick MorriseyWest Virginia Attorney General
|

Friend, We don't want to take a lot of your time, so we'll be brief.

House Conservatives have fallen SHORT of their mid-month goal. As of now, we are not on track to meet our goal for February. If we don't get back on track, our goals of retaking the House Majority and firing Nancy Pelosi could be over before they started.

name: Roger Misso
subject: 2/25 Event Invitation: Join Sen. Warnock, Rep. Sherrill, Rep. Lamb, & Sec. Murphy for a Salute to Service with Taking the Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to announce our first event of 2021: a _**[Salute to Service](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/bmoQc2gR7LSjo6YoC9A-GVztuEwJ7HdBxBVtDXPhaIg=)**_ celebrating our 12 incredible victories in the US House and Senate last year!

We are honored to be joined by three outstanding guests: Sen. **Raphael Warnock** (D-GA), Rep. **Mikie Sherrill** (NJ-11), and Rep. **Conor Lamb** (PA-17). Our founder, 32nd Under Secretary of the Army and former Rep. **Patrick J. Murphy** , will also be with us to usher in a new year of victories for veterans and military families!

Our work to hold the House and expand our majority in the US Senate is already beginning. In order to succeed, we need to raise as much as we can for this event. [_**Will you purchase a ticket to help us guarantee veterans and military family members on the ballot win and bring integrity back to government? Click here to help us raise at least $10,000 to meet our goals!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/bmoQc2gR7LSjo6YoC9A-GVztuEwJ7HdBxBVtDXPhaIg=)

[**Date: Thursday, February 25th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/bmoQc2gR7LSjo6YoC9A-GVztuEwJ7HdBxBVtDXPhaIg=)

We can't wait to see you next week!

In solidarity,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/3IquD5AwHiux-B8634JR-ciCV5dAby2PSmCWDDu3oUo=)
[@RogerMisso](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/vdmM3jbtReG__GRFNYwaTBkw_IG4vVfXLkPPnexKpg4=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2GETldF3LzVjynPBTbrmbnWFcxFLAbYObnZOp1j-Dek=/ehdo7piEmyN9xUllONe-LZn5oTDpfBI0Kd64D-TpDKc=).

name: Moms for Texas
subject: Urgent: Texas Needs New Leadership
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25216257/273172000/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzI1NGY0LTY2NzItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_IcIMoSSWpG7HIjChhqK5Mqs9elWoxKYNtC2oSgr1o=&emci=2ca61d18-5072-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=3ac254f4-6672-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) **Ted the Coward** "Ted Cruz jetting off to Mexico while Texans remain dying in the cold isn't surprising but it is deeply disturbing and disappointing." Hi Peter, Millions of people are without power in Texas and more snow is expected in the next couple of days. While the crisis continues and households across the state must go without heat, there is one person not freezing in Texas. **[Ted Cruz flew to Cancun and left behind everyone else who needed his leadership during a state emergency.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25216258/273172001/-2037401631?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzI1NGY0LTY2NzItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_IcIMoSSWpG7HIjChhqK5Mqs9elWoxKYNtC2oSgr1o=&emci=2ca61d18-5072-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=3ac254f4-6672-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)** This is not leadership. This is the kind of behavior that calls for resignation. Please join us and the Texas Democratic Party to call for the resignation of Senator Ted Cruz. Moms in Office will continue to organize and train women in Texas because there is no off year in politics. Together, we can flip Texas blue in 2022 and elect leaders who will not leave behind their constituents in the midst of a state emergency. **[Help us](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25216259/273172002/1978775130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzI1NGY0LTY2NzItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_IcIMoSSWpG7HIjChhqK5Mqs9elWoxKYNtC2oSgr1o=) **support organizations who are feeding the hungry and helping the homeless while state leaderships is failing Texans. Your contribution will go toward recruiting candidates in Texas for 2022 and it will also help us support organizations who are assisting the most vulnerable during this crisis. Please[**chip in** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25216260/273172003/1978775130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzI1NGY0LTY2NzItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_IcIMoSSWpG7HIjChhqK5Mqs9elWoxKYNtC2oSgr1o=)what you can afford today. Thank you! Simona Grace Founder, Moms in Office [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25216261/273172004/1978775130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhYzI1NGY0LTY2NzItZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u_IcIMoSSWpG7HIjChhqK5Mqs9elWoxKYNtC2oSgr1o=) Moms in Office
